key_obligations: Investment in new businesses, products, and technologies
Improvement of ad relevance and reduction of accidental clicks
Management of foreign exchange risk
Investing in research and development for new products and services
Delivering online advertising that is relevant to consumers
Creating platforms for other people's success and improving access to the Internet
Deliver innovative products and technologies to maintain competitiveness
Attract and retain users and advertisers
Protect proprietary technology and brand through intellectual property laws
Attract and retain alternative device manufacturers and distributors
Cooperate with regulatory authorities
Maintain and enhance the Google brand
Compliance with statutory requirements regarding copyright infringement and liability.
Notification to users in case of security breaches of personal data.
Indemnification for intellectual property infringement claims.
Management of manufacturing and supply chain risks
Compliance with laws and company policies by suppliers and business partners
Mitigation of web spam and content farm impacts on search quality
Retain and motivate key personnel
Attract qualified employees
Maintain corporate culture
Prohibition on cumulative voting in the election of directors
Stockholders must provide advance notice to nominate individuals for election
Board of directors has the right to issue shares of undesignated preferred stock
Users' behaviors and advertising continue to shift online
Expansion of product offerings to serve changing needs of advertisers
Increasing revenues from international markets due to users in developing economies coming online
